item.title: 曝苹果用 Gemini 训练端侧 AI，部分 Siri 请求转向谷歌云
item.guid: 曝苹果用-Gemini-训练端侧-AI，部分-Siri-请求转向谷歌云
item.description:
According to The Information, Apple plans to fully leverage on-device AI computing power at next month's Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC), while also introducing Nvidia's privacy technology to ensure the security of some cloud-based AI tasks. 据《The Information》报道，苹果计划在下月的全球开发者大会（WWDC）上全面发力端侧 AI 算力，同时将引入英伟达的隐私技术以保障部分云端 AI 任务的安全性。

Sources revealed that Apple is using Google's large language model Gemini to train lightweight models that can run locally (i.e., model distillation). 知情人士透露，苹果正利用谷歌大语言模型 Gemini 训练可本地运行的轻量化模型（即模型蒸馏）。

To advance model miniaturization, Apple is seeking to acquire relevant startups, with Liquid AI, an edge AI company in Cambridge, Massachusetts, being one of its potential acquisition targets. 为推进模型小型化，苹果正在寻求收购相关初创公司，马萨诸塞州剑桥市的边缘 AI 企业 Liquid AI 曾是其潜在的收购目标之一。

To address complex cloud-based demands that edge devices cannot handle, Apple has approved the use of Nvidia's Confidential Compute privacy protection technology within the Google Cloud environment. 针对端侧设备无法处理的复杂云端需求，苹果已批准在谷歌云（Google Cloud）环境中使用英伟达的机密计算（Confidential Compute）隐私保护技术。

This technology ensures the security of cloud AI requests by processing data and models with hardware-level encryption. This also means that while Apple maintains its 'Private Cloud Compute' brand promise, the underlying processing still relies on Nvidia GPUs and Google's cloud infrastructure. 该技术通过硬件级加密处理中的数据与模型，确保云端 AI 请求的安全性。这也意味着苹果在维持其「私有云计算（Private Cloud Compute）」品牌承诺的同时，底层处理过程仍需依赖英伟达 GPU 及谷歌的云基础设施。

item.title: 赛力斯回应特斯拉 FSD 入华
item.guid: 赛力斯回应特斯拉-FSD-入华
item.description:
According to IT Home, at the recent 4th Future Car Pioneer Conference, Seres Auto Chairman Zhang Zhengping shared his views on the comparison between Huawei Qiankun Intelligent Driving and Tesla FSD. 据 IT 之家报道，在近期的第四届未来汽车先行者大会上，赛力斯汽车董事长张正萍就华为乾崑智驾与特斯拉 FSD 的对比发表了看法。

He stated that the ultimate judgment of which intelligent driving system is superior should be left to the market for objective evaluation. When discussing specific technical routes, Zhang Zhengping pointed out: 他表示，两款智驾系统孰优孰劣，最终应交由市场来客观评判。在谈及具体技术路线时，张正萍指出：

Which intelligent driving system is better to use still needs to be answered by the market. The new generation AITO M9 is equipped with 6 LiDAR sensors, which is not inferior to FSD in this regard. Furthermore, FSD simulates human visual driving logic, while Huawei Qiankun Intelligent Driving can achieve a state where it 'sees beyond what human eyes can see'.

It is reported that Tesla FSD, starting from version V12, adopts a pure vision solution, relying on 8 cameras and an end-to-end neural network architecture, with simulating human visual logic at its core. 据悉，特斯拉 FSD 自 V12 版本起采用纯视觉方案，依托 8 颗摄像头与端到端神经网络架构，以模拟人类视觉逻辑为核心。

item.title: Anthropic 招聘把价值观面试放到关键位置
item.guid: Anthropic-招聘把价值观面试放到关键位置
item.description:
Bloomberg Businessweek reported on Anthropic's hiring process. The report states that after rapid expansion, the AI company still places 'whether candidates align with the company's mission' at the core of its interview process; applicants typically undergo multiple rounds of skill assessments and interviews, most of which require completion without the use of AI . 彭博商业周刊报道了 Anthropic 的招聘流程。报道称，这家 AI 公司快速扩张后，仍把「候选人是否认同公司使命」放在面试流程的核心位置；应聘者通常要经历多轮技能评估和面试， 其中多数练习要求不使用 AI 完成 。

The report mentioned that Anthropic's cultural interviews inquire about candidates' values, worldviews, and how they perceive AI risks. Several candidates and career coaches described this round of interviews as more in-depth than typical company culture interviews, even delving into professional ethical dilemmas, how candidates reacted at the time, and how they viewed it afterward. 报道提到，Anthropic 的文化面试会询问候选人的价值观、世界观，以及他们如何看待 AI 风险。多名候选人和职业教练形容，这一轮面试比普通公司文化面更深入，甚至会追问职业伦理困境、候选人在当时如何反应、事后如何看待。

Anthropic President Daniela Amodei previously stated in a podcast that the company asks candidates about their 'unusual but defensible' beliefs, with a focus on how candidates defend their judgment in uncomfortable situations. Anthropic 总裁 Daniela Amodei 此前在播客中称，公司会询问候选人有哪些「不寻常但愿意捍卫」的信念，考察重点包括候选人在不舒服的处境里捍卫自身判断的方式。

item.title: ChatGPT 消费级 AI 流量份额被追近，AI 市场进入「三足鼎立」
item.guid: ChatGPT-消费级-AI-流量份额被追近，AI-市场进入「三足鼎立」
item.description:
SimilarWeb's latest traffic data shows that the consumer AI market is shifting from ChatGPT's sole leadership to a 'three-way standoff' among OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic. SimilarWeb 最新流量数据显示，消费级 AI 市场正在从 ChatGPT 一家领先，转向 OpenAI、Google 和 Anthropic「三足鼎立」的态势。

Over the past six months, ChatGPT's share has dropped from approximately 80% to about 60%, Gemini's traffic relative to ChatGPT has risen from about 20% to about 50%, and Claude's has increased from about 3% to about 20%. 过去半年，ChatGPT 的份额从约 80% 降至约 60%，Gemini 相对 ChatGPT 的流量从约 20% 升至约 50%，Claude 则从约 3% 升至约 20%。

This data still shows ChatGPT maintaining its lead. Dongcha also mentioned that ChatGPT has approximately 900 million weekly active users, Gemini about 500 million, and Claude between 150 million and 200 million; Claude has the fastest quarterly growth among top websites, reaching 255%. 这组数据仍显示 ChatGPT 保持领先。动察同时提到，ChatGPT 周活用户约 9 亿，Gemini 约 5 亿，Claude 约 1.5 亿至 2 亿；Claude 在头部网站中的季度增速最快，达到 255%。

item.title: 黄仁勋回应 AI 烧钱：浪费点钱没事，别浪费时间
item.guid: 黄仁勋回应-AI-烧钱：浪费点钱没事，别浪费时间
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang recently responded to the issue of AI usage costs in an internal company meeting, stating that 'it's okay to waste a little money, but the key is not to waste time'. 据 36 氪报道，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋近期在公司内部会议上就 AI 使用成本问题作出回应，表示「稍微浪费一点钱没关系，但关键是不要浪费时间」。

During this internal meeting, an employee raised concerns that the current extensive use of AI merely consumes tokens without bringing substantial productivity improvements. Huang responded by saying that people find it difficult to master any technology in its early stages, so one should not strive for perfection from the outset, but rather take the first step and embrace new technologies. 此次内部会议上，有员工提出担忧，认为目前大量使用 AI 只是白白消耗 Token，并未带来实质性的生产力提升。黄仁勋对此回应称，任何技术在初期阶段人们都难以熟练运用，因此不应一开始就追求完美，而是应该先迈出一步，拥抱新技术。

Regarding AI usage costs, Jensen Huang consistently advocates for employees to use AI extensively. He previously stated that for an engineer earning $500,000 annually, if their token expenses were less than $250,000, he would be concerned; if they only spent $5,000, he would be 'furious'. 在 AI 使用成本问题上，黄仁勋一贯主张员工应大量使用 AI。他此前曾表示，对于一名年薪 50 万美元的工程师，若其 Token 费用低于 25 万美元，他会感到担忧；若仅花费 5000 美元，他则会「气炸」。

His logic is that he would rather spend half of an employee's salary on AI costs to achieve a 10-fold increase in efficiency. 他的逻辑是，宁可拿出员工薪资的一半用于 AI 费用，也要换来 10 倍的效率提升。

item.title: 刘强东提出「3 个 12」原则，京东规定员工每日工作不超 12 小时
item.guid: 刘强东提出「3-个-12」原则，京东规定员工每日工作不超-12-小时
item.description:
According to TechWeb, JD.com recently introduced a new work hour management rule internally called '3 x 12'. This principle was proposed by founder Richard Liu last week and is being gradually implemented across multiple departments within the group starting this week. Relevant notifications have now been cascaded down from C1 and C2 levels, and frontline R&D teams have received specific arrangements. 据 TechWeb 报道，京东集团近日在内部推出了一项名为「3 个 12」的工作时间管理新规。该原则由创始人刘强东于上周提出，并于本周起在集团内多个部门逐步推进落实。目前相关通知已从 C1、C2 层级向下传达，一线研发团队已收到具体安排。

The '3 x 12' principle revolves around three quantitative indicators: 「3 个 12」原则围绕三项量化指标展开：

    First, employees' daily working hours should generally not exceed 12 hours, with exceptions only during major promotional periods or special projects;

    Second, employees are encouraged to leave the company no later than 12 AM, and workplaces should guide employees on duty to leave for rest and arrange lights out at midnight 24:00;

    Third, the number of consecutive working days for employees shall not exceed 12 days, to prevent long-term overtime without rest.

JD.com stated that the introduction of this new regulation is a proactive adjustment made in response to the excessive workload of some internal teams, aiming to explicitly incorporate employee physical and mental health into management guidance and standardize daily office work and overtime management mechanisms through quantified working hour standards. 京东方面表示，此次新规的出台，是针对内部部分团队工作强度过大问题所作的主动调整，旨在将员工身心健康明确纳入管理导向，通过量化的工作时间标准规范日常办公与加班管理机制。

item.title: 一个月烧掉 5 亿美元，企业 AI 账单失控
item.guid: 一个月烧掉-5-亿美元，企业-AI-账单失控
item.description:
According to Axios, the business community is questioning the continuously rising AI spending, with cost control and return on investment becoming the core contradiction in enterprise AI procurement by 2026. 据 Axios 报道，企业界正在对持续攀升的 AI 支出产生质疑，成本控制与投资回报问题已成为 2026 年企业 AI 采购的核心矛盾。

Microsoft recently canceled most Claude Code licenses, with cost being one of the main reasons. Uber's COO also publicly stated that AI-related spending is "increasingly difficult to justify." 微软近期取消了大部分 Claude Code 许可证，成本是主要原因之一。Uber 的 COO 也公开表示，AI 相关支出「越来越难以合理化」。

An AI consultant revealed to Axios that one of their clients, due to not setting usage limits for employees' Claude licenses, burned through $500 million in a single month . 一名 AI 顾问向 Axios 透露，其客户中有企业因未对员工的 Claude 许可证设置使用上限， 在单月内烧掉了 5 亿美元 。

CloudBees CEO Anuj Kapur told Axios that some companies are laying off employees under the guise of AI automation, but in reality, layoffs might just be "the only lever they can pull" to offset soaring AI bills. Meanwhile, consumer attitudes towards AI are cooling, and employee resistance is also spreading. CloudBees CEO Anuj Kapur 向 Axios 表示，部分企业正以 AI 自动化为由裁员，但实际上裁员可能只是「他们能拉动的唯一杠杆」，用于抵消高涨的 AI 账单。与此同时，消费者对 AI 的态度也在转冷，员工层面的抵制情绪同样在蔓延。

item.title: 工信部：动力电池进入规模化退役阶段
item.guid: 工信部：动力电池进入规模化退役阶段
item.description:
On May 28, the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology held the second meeting of the national special working group on the recycling and utilization of new energy vehicle power batteries, stating that China's new energy vehicle power batteries have entered a large-scale retirement phase, and accelerating the improvement of the waste power battery recycling and utilization system has become a key task for 2026. 工业和信息化部 5 月 28 日召开全国新能源汽车动力电池回收利用工作专班第二次会议，称我国新能源汽车动力电池已进入规模化退役阶段，加快健全废旧动力电池回收利用体系已经成为 2026 年重点工作。

The meeting called for strengthening collaboration around the construction of laws, policies, and standard systems, as well as research on major issues, and launching a special joint law enforcement action to regulate the recycling and utilization of waste power batteries. The focus will be on investigating and prosecuting violations such as illegal delivery of waste power batteries, using waste power batteries to produce unqualified products, failing to fulfill information traceability responsibilities, illegal dismantling causing environmental pollution, and operating without a license. 会议要求围绕法规、政策、标准体系建设和重大问题研究加强协同，并开展规范废旧动力电池回收利用联合执法专项行动。重点查处违规交售废旧动力电池、用废旧动力电池生产不合格产品、不履行信息溯源责任、非法拆解污染环境、无照经营等行为。

The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology also required enterprises to strengthen their primary responsibility, use digital technology to enhance monitoring of power battery flow, and guide industry associations, key enterprises, and research institutions to cooperate in exploring advanced technical equipment and new business models. 工信部还要求压实企业主体责任，运用数字化技术加强动力电池流向监测，并引导行业协会、重点企业和研究机构合作，探索先进技术装备和新型商业模式。

item.title: 宇树具身智能体验馆亚洲首店将落地上海静安
item.guid: 宇树具身智能体验馆亚洲首店将落地上海静安
item.description: Unitree Robotics announced that the first Unitree Embodied AI Experience Center in Asia will open tomorrow in Shanghai. The store is located on the 2nd floor of Jiuguang Department Store, No. 1618 West Nanjing Road, Jing'an District, Shanghai, covering an area of over 100 square meters, directly across the street from Apple Jing'an. The store will showcase products such as humanoid robots and quadruped robot dogs. 宇树科技宣布，宇树具身智能体验馆亚洲首店将于明天在上海开业。门店位于上海市静安区南京西路 1618 号久光百货 2 层，面积超过 100 平方米，街对面就是 Apple 静安，门店将展示人形机器人、四足机器狗等产品。

item.title: 宝马将在莱比锡工厂使用人形机器人
item.guid: 宝马将在莱比锡工厂使用人形机器人
item.description:
According to the BBC, BMW plans to use humanoid robots in European car production for the first time this summer, with two Aeon robots manufactured by Hexagon Robotics currently being tested at the Leipzig plant. Michael Nikolaides, BMW's Head of Process Management and Digitalization, stated that humanoid robots will be the future of car production. 据 BBC 报道，宝马计划今年夏天在欧洲汽车生产中首次使用人形机器人，两台由 Hexagon Robotics 制造的 Aeon 机器人目前正在莱比锡工厂测试。宝马流程管理和数字化负责人 Michael Nikolaides 表示，人形机器人将是汽车生产的未来。

Aeon is 1.65 meters tall, weighs 60 kilograms, has a maximum movement speed of 2.4 meters/second, can carry 15 kilograms for a short period, and has a continuous carrying capacity of 8 kilograms. Its body is equipped with 21 sensors, including cameras, radar, microphones, force sensors, and torque sensors. Its battery life is about 3 hours, after which the battery needs to be replaced. Aeon 身高 1.65 米，重量 60 公斤，最高移动速度 2.4 米/秒，短时间可搬运 15 公斤，持续搬运能力为 8 公斤。机身配备 21 个传感器，包括摄像头、雷达、麦克风、力传感器和扭矩传感器。它的电池工作时间约 3 小时，随后需要更换电池。

item.title: 哈啰明确顺风车高速费规则
item.guid: 哈啰明确顺风车高速费规则
item.description:
Hello Inc. yesterday released a guide for carpooling highway toll rules. The core rule is that the method of bearing highway tolls is subject to the passenger's remarks, and the driver's acceptance of the order indicates acceptance of this method. 哈啰昨日发布顺风车高速费规则指南，核心规则是高速费承担方式以乘客备注为准，车主接单即表示接受该承担方式。

    If the passenger chooses "willing to negotiate fees," the agreed-upon result via the platform chat box and platform phone call shall prevail; the driver should complete the negotiation before accepting the order or within 2 hours after accepting the order, and before the passenger gets in the car. If overdue, highway tolls will not be charged by default;

    If the passenger chooses "I will bear all costs," they shall solely bear the highway toll fees corresponding to the start and end points of their journey;

    If "I will not bear the cost" is chosen, the passenger does not bear the highway toll, and the driver can decide whether to take the highway.

The rules also list violation scenarios, including drivers charging passengers who have refused to bear costs, repeatedly charging highway tolls, charging tolls when none were incurred, charging tolls inconsistent with the actual journey, and passengers refusing to pay after reaching an agreement. 规则还列出违规场景，包括车主向已拒绝承担费用的乘客收费、重复收取高速费、未产生高速费却收费、收取与实际行程不符的高速费，以及协商一致后乘客拒不支付。

For violations, drivers who overcharge must refund the excess amount and may have their growth value and trust score deducted, be banned for 3 to 7 days, or permanently banned for severe cases; passengers who fail to pay highway tolls as agreed will not be able to continue booking rides until payment is completed. Hello Inc. also reminds that highway tolls should be paid through the carpooling platform, not via offline transfers. 违规处理上，车主多收费用需退回，并可能被扣成长值、信任分，封禁 3 至 7 天，严重者永久封禁；乘客未按约支付高速费，将在支付完成前不能继续叫车。哈啰同时提醒，高速费应通过顺风车平台支付，不要线下转账。

item.title: MiniMax 正式启动 A 股 IPO
item.guid: MiniMax-正式启动-A-股-IPO
item.description:
According to information from the CSRC official website, MiniMax signed a tutoring agreement with CITIC Securities on May 29, officially initiating its A-share IPO process. 据证监会官网信息，MiniMax 已于 5 月 29 日与中信证券签署辅导协议，正式启动 A 股 IPO 进程。

Previously, Zhipu signed a coaching agreement with Guotai Haitong on February 9 this year, and jointly participated in the STAR Market listing coaching work with CICC, which had previously signed a contract. MiniMax's initiation of coaching this time means that the "duo of large models," Zhipu and MiniMax, are expected to be listed on the A-share market simultaneously. 此前，智谱已于今年 2 月 9 日与国泰海通签署辅导协议，并与此前已签约的中金公司共同参与科创板上市辅导工作。MiniMax 此次启动辅导，意味着「大模型双雄」智谱与 MiniMax 有望同步在 A 股上市。

item.title: 智谱市值升至 8800 亿港元
item.guid: 智谱市值升至-8800-亿港元
item.description: According to Caixin.com, Zhipu AI's Hong Kong stock market value once rose to approximately HKD 880 billion, with its share price nearly 17 times its IPO price of HKD 116.2 in January. As of yesterday's close, its market value was HKD 711.12 billion. 据财新网报道，智谱 AI 港股市值一度升至约 8800 亿港元，股价接近 1 月上市发行价 116.2 港元的 17 倍。截止昨日收盘市值 7111.20 亿港元。

item.title: 💡 莫言：AI 创作本质是二手货，取代不了作家的原创能力
item.guid: 💡-莫言：AI-创作本质是二手货，取代不了作家的原创能力
item.description:
According to an interview with Xinhua News Agency, Mo Yan recently stated when discussing AI and literary creation that he believes AI cannot replace a writer's creation. 据新华社采访，莫言近日谈到 AI 与文学创作时表示，他认为 AI 无法取代作家的创作。

I believe that a writer's most valuable asset is originality—the ability to write novels or poems that they themselves have not written and others have not written, to create typical character images that have never appeared in others' works. This is the reason and value for a writer's existence.

Mo Yan further analyzed that current AI-generated content does not possess originality. 莫言进一步分析，当下 AI 生成内容并不具备原创能力。

AI is fed with content written by generations of writers. Based on a massive volume of works, it can recombine them to produce creations that seem as if no one has ever seen them before. But I believe it is not original; it is still second-hand.

Mo Yan also admitted that the application of AI as an auxiliary tool has become a trend, especially in translation work where its value will gradually become apparent. In literary planning, film and television production, and technical aspects, AI will also become increasingly important, and some positions will be impacted as a result. 莫言也承认，AI 作为辅助工具的应用已成趋势，尤其在翻译工作中会逐步体现价值；在文学策划、影视制作和技术环节中，AI 也会越来越重要，部分岗位会因此受到冲击。

In the interview, he also discussed AI's differentiating effect on people: tools will make smart people smarter, and may also cause those lacking judgment to further rely on ready-made outputs. 采访中，他还谈到 AI 对人的分化作用：工具会让聪明人变得更聪明，也可能让缺少判断的人进一步依赖现成输出。

item.title: 2899 元起，vivo S60 系列发布
item.guid: 2899-元起，vivo-S60-系列发布
item.description:
The vivo S60 series was officially released yesterday, with the vivo S60 priced from 3599 yuan and the vivo S60 Vitality Edition priced from 2899 yuan. The series of phones is endorsed by Tian Xiwei and offers three color options: "Star Sea," "Early Summer Green," and "Midsummer Night." The body is 7.92mm thick and weighs 199g. vivo S60 系列昨日正式发布，其中 vivo S60 定价 3599 元起，vivo S60 元气版定价 2899 元起。系列手机由田曦薇代言，提供「星星海」「初夏绿」「仲夏夜」三种配色，机身厚 7.92mm，重量 199g。

    Screen: 6.59-inch 1260p 144Hz flat screen;

    Imaging: Front 50MP camera; S60 rear 50MP large-sensor main camera, 8MP ultra-wide, and 50MP IMX882 3X periscope telephoto; S60 Vitality Edition features a 50MP large-sensor main camera and 8MP ultra-wide.

    Performance: S60 is equipped with Snapdragon 8s Gen 3, and the Vitality Edition with Dimensity 7500;

    Battery: Both models are equipped with a 7200mAh Blue Ocean battery, supporting 90W wired charging;

    Others: Standard 3D ultrasonic fingerprint, offering IP68 and IP69, stereo dual speakers, infrared remote control, and X-axis linear motor.

This time, vivo focuses on 4K Live images and Xiaohongshu publishing scenarios. Officially, the S60 supports 4K Live, Starlight Live, Live Color Palette, Inspiration Fun Sticker Live, and 3D spatial effects generated from Live cover frames; vivo also states that the S60 is the only product in the industry to support publishing 3D spatial images on Xiaohongshu. vivo 这次重点放在 4K Live 图像和小红书发布场景。官方称 S60 支持 4K Live、星光 Live、Live 调色盘、灵感趣贴 Live，以及由 Live 封面帧生成 3D 空间效果；vivo 还称 S60 是行业内唯一支持在小红书发布 3D 空间图的产品。

🔗 Related reading: vivo S60 Experience: A Phone That Should Be Used More, Thought About Less 🔗 相关阅读： vivo S60 体验：手机，就该少想多用

item.title: 小米 17T 系列将在中国大陆发售
item.guid: 小米-17T-系列将在中国大陆发售
item.description:
Yesterday, Lu Weibing, President of Xiaomi Group, revealed in a post that the Xiaomi 17T series will be released in mainland China, expected to launch in early June. 昨日，小米集团总裁卢伟冰发文透露，小米 17T 系列将在中国大陆发布，预计 6 月上旬上线。

Lu Weibing introduced that Xiaomi first released the Xiaomi T series "Xiaomi 9T" in 2019; subsequently, Xiaomi spent seven years and seven generations of products directly competing with iPhone and Samsung Galaxy S series. 卢伟冰介绍，小米 2019 年首次发布小米 T 系列「小米 9T」；随后小米用了七年时间、七代产品和 iPhone、三星 Galaxy S 系列正面竞争。

According to his information, the Xiaomi T series has garnered over 15 million users globally, covering Europe, Southeast Asia, Latin America, the Middle East, Japan, and more than 100 countries and regions. 据其信息来看，小米 T 系列已经在全球拥有了超 1500 万用户，覆盖欧洲、东南亚、拉美、中东、日本，100 多个国家和地区。

Recently, Xiaomi has released the Xiaomi 17T series in regions such as Hong Kong/Taiwan, China, and Japan. The new phone offers two versions, 17T and 17T Pro. The former features a 6.59-inch flat screen, Dimensity 8500-Ultra, and Leica triple cameras; the latter features Dimensity 9500, a 6.83-inch flat screen, and Leica triple cameras. 近期，小米已经在中国香港/台湾、日本等地区发布了小米 17T 系列。新机提供 17T 和 17T Pro 两个版本，前者采用 6.59 英寸直屏、天玑 8500-Ultra、徕卡三摄；后者采用天玑 9500、6.83 英寸直屏、徕卡三摄。

item.title: 基础套装 8999 元，哈浮 AQUA 发布，零零科技把飞行相机带到水上运动
item.guid: 基础套装-8999-元，哈浮-AQUA-发布，零零科技把飞行相机带到水上运动
item.description:
Zero Zero Robotics released Hover AQUA, positioned as a 100% waterproof flying camera for water sports. 零零科技发布哈浮 AQUA，定位为面向水上运动的 100% 防水飞行相机。

AQUA belongs to the new Hover family series, with a body weight of less than 250 grams. It features IP67 dust and water resistance, a positive buoyancy design, and the ability to take off and land on water, making it suitable for scenarios such as hydrofoiling, wakeboarding, kitesurfing, kayaking, sailing, paddleboarding, and jet skiing. AQUA 属于哈浮家族新系列，机身重量低于 250 克，具备 IP67 防尘防水、正浮力设计和水面起降能力，可用于水上飞翼、尾波滑水、风筝冲浪、皮划艇、帆船、桨板和水上摩托艇等场景。

AQUA can withstand Level 7 strong winds, has a maximum speed of 40 km/h, and is equipped with a hydrophobic lens, anti-fog technology, and corrosion-resistant structure. The imaging section uses a 1/1.28-inch CMOS sensor, capable of recording 4K video at up to 100fps, and features over 15 intelligent shooting modes, including paddleboard, kayak, and hydrofoil modes. AQUA 可抵御 7 级大风，最高时速 40 公里，配备疏水镜头、防雾技术和防腐蚀结构；影像部分使用 1/1.28 英寸 CMOS 传感器，最高录制 100fps 的 4K 视频，并内置超过 15 种智能运镜模式，包括桨板、皮划艇和水翼板模式。

Wakeboarding world champion Dominik Gührs stated that AQUA allows him to complete water sports filming alone without needing to arrange photographers and complex equipment. The product is now available on domestic e-commerce platforms and offline channels, with a retail price of 8999 yuan for the basic package and 9999 yuan for the fly-more package. 尾波滑水世界冠军 Dominik Gührs 表示，AQUA 让他不必安排摄影师和复杂设备，也能独自完成水上运动拍摄。产品现已在国内电商平台和线下渠道发售，基础套装零售价 8999 元，畅飞套装零售价 9999 元。

item.title: 2699 元起，荣耀 WIN Turbo 发布
item.guid: 2699-元起，荣耀-WIN-Turbo-发布
item.description:
Honor WIN Turbo was released yesterday, with a suggested retail price starting from 3299 yuan and an initial promotional price starting from 2699 yuan. Versions include 12GB + 256GB, 12GB + 512GB, and 16GB + 512GB, with initial prices of 2699 yuan, 2999 yuan, and 3599 yuan respectively. 荣耀 WIN Turbo 昨日发布，建议零售价 3299 元起，首发优惠价 2699 元起。版本包括 12GB + 256GB、12GB + 512GB 和 16GB + 512GB，首发价分别为 2699 元、2999 元和 3599 元。

This phone focuses on a large battery and gaming scenarios, offering three color options: "Quick Blackout," "Guaranteed Win," and "Fearless Blue." It supports IP68, IP69, and IP69K dust and water resistance ratings. The front features a 6.79-inch 1.5K LTPS OLED flat screen, supporting 8000nits peak brightness and 3840Hz "zero-risk" dimming. 该机主打大电池和游戏场景，提供「快开黑」「指定赢」「不怕蓝」三种配色，支持 IP68、IP69、IP69K 防尘防水等级。正面为 6.79 英寸 1.5K LTPS OLED 直屏，支持 8000nits 峰值亮度和 3840Hz「零风险」调光。

In terms of performance, the Honor WIN Turbo is equipped with the Dimensity 8500 Racing Edition processor, offering up to 16GB of RAM and 512GB of storage. It features a built-in 10000mAh Qinghai Lake battery, supporting 80W fast charging and 27W reverse charging. 性能部分，荣耀 WIN Turbo 搭载天玑 8500 竞速版处理器，最高提供 16GB 内存和 512GB 存储，内置 10000mAh 青海湖电池，支持 80W 快充和 27W 反向充电。

item.title: Claude Code 上线动态工作流预览版
item.guid: Claude-Code-上线动态工作流预览版
item.description:
Anthropic announced the launch of a preview version of "Dynamic Workflows" in Claude Code's CLI, Desktop, and VS Code plugins, targeting long-term R&D tasks such as complex bug tracking across service codebases, large-scale refactoring, framework migration, and pre-launch adversarial testing. Anthropic 宣布在 Claude Code 的 CLI、Desktop 和 VS Code 插件中上线「动态工作流」预览版，面向跨服务代码库的复杂 Bug 追踪、大规模重构、框架迁移和上线前对抗测试等长程研发任务。

This mechanism transforms the original single-threaded programming agents into an orchestrated workflow: the main agent writes orchestration scripts for tasks, breaking down goals into dozens to hundreds of parallel sub-agents; 这套机制把原本单线程的编程 Agent 改成编排式工作流：主 Agent 会为任务编写编排脚本，将目标拆解给数十到数百个并行子 Agent；

Before merging code, the system also arranges independent sub-agents to perform multi-perspective adversarial testing and introduces two rounds of code review by Reviewer Agents. To support continuous operation, dynamic workflows also include incremental auto-archiving and breakpoint resume. 合并代码前，系统还会安排独立子 Agent 做多视角对抗测试，并引入两轮 Reviewer Agents 代码审查。为支持连续运行，动态工作流还加入增量自动存档和断点续传。

item.title: 阶跃星辰开源 Step 3.7 Flash
item.guid: 阶跃星辰开源-Step-3.7-Flash
item.description:
StepAhead released and open-sourced the new generation Flash large model, Step 3.7 Flash, positioned as a foundational model for production-grade agents, code, networked search, and multimodal workflows. 阶跃星辰发布并开源新一代 Flash 大模型 Step 3.7 Flash，定位为面向生产级 Agent、代码、联网搜索和多模态工作流的模型底座。

The model architecture consists of a 196B language backbone and a 1.8B visual Transformer, with a total of approximately 198B parameters, about 11B active parameters, supporting 256K context and 3 inference tiers. 模型架构由 196B 语言主干和 1.8B 视觉 Transformer 组成，总参数约 198B，激活参数约 11B，支持 256K 上下文和 3 档推理。

The official statement claims that Step 3.7 Flash can autonomously select, crop, and re-read local information in UI interfaces or charts, and actively retrieve and verify information when uncertain. In terms of performance, the model achieved 67.1% in the ClawEval-1.1 autonomous task execution evaluation, 79.2% in SimpleVQA Search, 95.3% in V* Python, and 56.3% in SWE-Bench Pro. 官方称，Step 3.7 Flash 可以在 UI 界面或图表中自主框选、裁剪和重读局部信息，并在信息不确定时主动检索验证。性能方面，模型在 ClawEval-1.1 自主任务执行评测中达到 67.1%，SimpleVQA Search 为 79.2%，V* Python 为 95.3%，SWE-Bench Pro 为 56.3%。

item.title: Liquid AI 开源端侧 MoE 模型 LFM2.5
item.guid: Liquid-AI-开源端侧-MoE-模型-LFM2.5
item.description:
Liquid AI released and open-sourced the edge-side Mixture-of-Experts model LFM2.5-8B-A1B. The model has a total of 8B parameters, but only 1B parameters are activated per run. Target devices include mobile phones, personal computers, and robots, supporting local fine-tuning and offline operation on personal devices and single consumer-grade graphics cards. Liquid AI 发布并开源端侧混合专家模型 LFM2.5-8B-A1B。模型总参数为 8B，但每次运行只激活 1B 参数，目标设备包括手机、个人电脑和机器人，支持个人设备和单张消费级显卡上的本地微调与离线运行。

This update shifts LFM2.5-8B-A1B towards a "think first, then answer" inference model and expands the context capacity from 32K to 128K. Liquid AI also extended the vocabulary to 128K to improve the processing efficiency of non-English text; their materials show that Thai and Hindi processing efficiency increased by 238.2% and 120.4% respectively, and Arabic by 38.8%. 这次更新把 LFM2.5-8B-A1B 转向「先思考、后回答」的推理模型，并把上下文容量从 32K 扩大到 128K。Liquid AI 还把词表扩展到 128K，以提升非英语文本处理效率；其材料显示，泰语和印地语处理效率分别提升 238.2% 与 120.4%，阿拉伯语提升 38.8%。

The team also carried out targeted optimizations for common issues in small models, such as circular reasoning and hallucinations. Liquid AI states that targeted reinforcement learning makes the model more inclined to admit "I don't know" when exceeding its knowledge boundaries, improving the hallucination-free rate from 7.46% in the previous generation to 63.47%. 团队还针对小模型常见的循环推理和幻觉问题做了专项优化。Liquid AI 称，靶向强化学习让模型在超出知识边界时更倾向于承认不知道，无幻觉率从前代 7.46% 提升至 63.47%。

item.title: 小米开源可控视频音效模型 ControlFoley
item.guid: 小米开源可控视频音效模型-ControlFoley
item.description:
Xiaomi Tech's official account released and open-sourced ControlFoley, a multimodal controllable video sound effect generation framework, targeting automatic video dubbing scenarios. It extends "matching sound to visuals" into multi-conditional control: creators can simultaneously input video, text instructions, and reference audio to specify the desired sound content and timbre style. 小米技术公众号发布并开源多模态可控视频音效生成框架 ControlFoley，面向视频自动配音场景。它把「看画面配声音」扩展为多条件控制：创作者可以同时输入视频、文本指令和参考音频，指定希望生成的声音内容和音色风格。

ControlFoley primarily addresses three types of control problems: ControlFoley 主要解决三类控制问题：

    When there is a semantic conflict between text and visuals, the model can prioritize responding to the user's text intent;

    When the user provides reference audio, the model attempts to preserve the reference timbre without disrupting audio-visual synchronization;

    When input condition combinations change, unified multimodal representation and random modal dropout training keep the model stable in tasks such as TV2A, TC-V2A, and AC-V2A.

Experimental results provided by Xiaomi show that ControlFoley achieves better semantic alignment, temporal synchronization, and sound quality performance compared to open-source baselines across multiple datasets. 小米给出的实验结果显示，ControlFoley 在多个数据集上对比开源基线取得更好的语义对齐、时间同步和声音质量表现。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/YJX-Xiaomi/ControlFoley 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/YJX-Xiaomi/ControlFoley

item.title: 腾讯混元发布 Agent 记忆插件 Hy-Memory
item.guid: 腾讯混元发布-Agent-记忆插件-Hy-Memory
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan released Hy-Memory, positioned as a memory plugin for long-term collaborative agents like OpenClaw, aiming to solve problems such as memory fragmentation, attention dilution, and old preference overwriting that often occur when long-cycle agents run across days and sessions. 腾讯混元发布 Hy-Memory，定位为面向 OpenClaw 等长期协作型智能体的记忆插件，旨在解决长周期 Agent 在跨天、跨会话运行中容易出现的记忆碎片化、注意力稀释和旧偏好覆盖问题。

    Hy-Memory's architecture is divided into a 6-layer memory framework, breaking down memories into levels such as facts, profiles, mental models, and forward-looking intentions;

    It also introduces a dual-system mechanism, where System 1 is responsible for extracting instant facts and session summaries in milliseconds, and System 2 refines user mental models and knowledge networks in the background;

    The system also uses supersedes pointers to link new and old memories into an evolutionary chain, allowing retrieval results to retain both the latest conclusions and the path of preference changes.

In terms of evaluation, Tencent states that Hy-Memory scored 85.2 in LongMemEval and leads in indicators such as preference, temporal reasoning, and knowledge updating. 评测方面，腾讯称 Hy-Memory 在 LongMemEval 中取得 85.2 分，并在偏好、时序推理和知识更新等指标上领先。

In terms of performance, its write speed is 8 times that of Graphiti, the number of memory entries is about 1/3 of mem0 and 1/4 of Graphiti, and Token consumption in long-context processing is reduced by 35%. Hy-Memory offers Lite, Pro, and Ultra configurations, defaulting to the Chroma local embedded vector library. 性能上，其写入速度为 Graphiti 的 8 倍，记忆条数约为 mem0 的 1/3、Graphiti 的 1/4，长上下文处理中的 Token 消耗降低 35%。Hy-Memory 提供 Lite、Pro 和 Ultra 三档配置，默认使用 Chroma 本地嵌入式向量库。

item.title: 下月起，违规乘车拒不补票将被限制购票
item.guid: 下月起，违规乘车拒不补票将被限制购票
item.description:
CCTV News quoted China State Railway Group as saying that the new version of the "China State Railway Group Co., Ltd. Railway Passenger Transport Regulations" will be officially implemented on June 1, for the first time setting ticket purchase restrictions for passengers who violate regulations and refuse to pay for tickets. 新闻联播援引中国国家铁路集团消息称，新版《中国国家铁路集团有限公司铁路旅客运输规程》将于 6 月 1 日正式实施，首次对违规乘车并拒绝补票的旅客设置限制购票规则。

The new regulations cover violations including riding without a ticket, using altered, forged, or defaced travel documents, discrepancies between ticket, ID, and passenger, holding a low-fare ticket for a high-fare class, and holding a discounted or preferential ticket without the required reduction certificate or not meeting the reduction conditions. 新规覆盖的违规情形包括无票乘车，持用变造、伪造或涂改的乘车凭证乘车，票、证、人不一致，持低票价席别车票乘坐高票价席别，以及持优惠票、优待票但没有规定减价凭证或不符合减价条件。

When the above situations occur and passengers refuse to pay for tickets, railway station and train staff will inform them on the spot of the irregular travel behavior and subsequent ticket purchase restrictions. When restricted passengers purchase tickets again, railway transport enterprises will prompt the reason for the restriction via 12306 or ticket windows. After passengers pay the outstanding ticket fare and an additional 50% of the outstanding fare, ticket purchase restrictions will be automatically lifted through online or offline methods; 发生上述情形且拒绝补票时，铁路站车工作人员会现场告知违规乘车行为及后续限制购票措施。被限制购票旅客再次购票时，铁路运输企业会通过 12306 或售票窗口提示限制原因。旅客支付应补票款及应补票款 50% 的加收票款后，可通过线上或线下方式自动解除购票限制；

After paying for the ticket, a railway electronic invoice can still be issued within 180 days from the end of the original journey. The new passenger regulations also adjusted the student ticket discount range, connecting ticket refund, and lost item delivery rules. 补票后，自原行程结束之日起 180 日内仍可开具铁路电子发票。新版客规还调整了学生票优惠区间、联程票退票和遗失物品寄递规则。

item.title: 小红书视频支持杜比全景声
item.guid: 小红书视频支持杜比全景声
item.description:
Yesterday, Dolby Laboratories and Xiaohongshu announced that Xiaohongshu has launched Dolby Atmos content sharing functionality. Both parties had already introduced Dolby Vision to Xiaohongshu in 2024, and with this new audio dimension, creators can now publish video content with both Dolby Vision and Dolby Atmos on supported devices. 昨天，杜比实验室与小红书宣布，小红书上线杜比全景声内容分享功能。双方 2024 年已把杜比视界引入小红书，这次新增音频维度后，创作者可以在支持设备上发布同时具备杜比视界和杜比全景声的视频内容。

Xiaohongshu users can preview, share, and enjoy Dolby Atmos content on the Xiaohongshu mobile app via Dolby Atmos-enabled iPhones or Android phones; they can also access the Xiaohongshu web version via Safari browser on Mac or iPad to share and watch. 小红书用户可通过支持杜比全景声的 iPhone 或安卓手机，在小红书移动端 App 预览、分享和欣赏杜比全景声内容；也可以通过 Mac 或 iPad 上的 Safari 浏览器访问小红书网页端完成分享和观看。

item.title: 蜜雪冰城推出薄荷系列新品
item.guid: 蜜雪冰城推出薄荷系列新品
item.description:
Mixue Ice Cream & Tea announced yesterday the launch of its new mint series, featuring refreshing summer flavors. The series includes four products: Mint Ice Cream, Mint Crispy Sundae, Mint Milk Tea, and Snow King Coffee with Mint. 蜜雪冰城昨日宣布薄荷系列新品上市，主打夏季清凉口味，系列包括薄荷冰淇淋、薄荷脆皮小圣代、薄荷奶绿和雪王雪顶咖啡薄荷味四款产品。

According to the official introduction, Mint Milk Tea combines mint flavor, jasmine green tea, and milky aroma; Mint Ice Cream offers two options: mint flavor and double swirl flavor; Mint Crispy Sundae consists of mint ice cream, chocolate crispy shell, and Oreo cookie crumbs. 官方介绍显示，薄荷奶绿把薄荷风味、茉莉绿茶和奶香组合在一起；薄荷冰淇淋提供薄荷味和双炫味两种选择；薄荷脆皮小圣代由薄荷冰淇淋、巧克力脆皮和奥利奥饼干碎组成。

item.title: 好想来下架争议 NFC 果汁
item.guid: 好想来下架争议-NFC-果汁
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, after CCTV News exposed the chaos of juice labeling, a series of juice drinks under Haoxianglai attracted attention. The program mentioned that the product's outer packaging prominently stated "100% Juice" and "NFC Not From Concentrate," but the first two ingredients in the list were water and concentrated juice, indicating that the label information did not match the actual ingredients. 据界面新闻报道，央视新闻曝光果汁标签乱象后，好想来旗下一款系列果汁饮料引发关注。节目提到，该产品外包装显著标注「100% 果汁」和「NFC 非浓缩还原」，但配料表前两位为水和浓缩果汁，标签信息与实际成分不符。

The PR representative of Wanchen Group, to which Haoxianglai belongs, responded that the relevant products have label flaws, which consumers might interpret as pure NFC juice. The company has already delisted the products and will redesign the packaging in the future to avoid such ambiguities. The report also listed previous cases involving Beibingyang, Master Kong, and others that sparked controversy over juice content and packaging labels. 好想来所属万辰集团公关负责人回应称，相关产品涉及标签瑕疵，消费者可能理解为纯 NFC 果汁，公司已先将产品下架，未来会重新制作包装，避免相关歧义。报道还列举了北冰洋、康师傅等此前因果汁含量和包装标识引发争议的案例。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜任天堂做了一个会翻你相册的怪游戏
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜任天堂做了一个会翻你相册的怪游戏
item.description:
According to The Verge, Nintendo launched the mobile game "Pictonico" this week. It looks like a lightweight version of "WarioWare": each round features 10 consecutive micro-games lasting only a few seconds, with simple instructions like "chomp" appearing on the screen, requiring players to immediately understand the action, such as grabbing a mouth to make it chew food. 据 The Verge 报道，任天堂本周上线了手机游戏《Pictonico》。它看起来像一个轻量版《瓦力欧制造》：每轮连续出现 10 个只有几秒钟的微型游戏，屏幕给出「chomp」之类的简单指令，玩家需要立刻理解操作，比如抓住一张嘴让它咀嚼食物。

Its interesting aspect is that the game uses photos from your phone's album to customize the experience. The Verge mentioned that players will see album content re-inserted into mini-game scenarios during absurd actions like plucking hair, licking lollipops, and peeling bananas. 它有意思的地方在于，游戏会使用手机相册里的照片定制体验。The Verge 提到，玩家会在拔毛、舔棒棒糖、剥香蕉等荒诞动作里，看到相册内容被重新放进小游戏场景。

It doesn't require sitting down to strategize; it's more like a fragmented toy that mixes private photo albums, a few seconds of reaction time, and Nintendo-esque absurdity. It transforms phone albums from 'being browsed' to 'being used as mini-game props'. 它不需要坐下来攻略，更像一种把私人相册、几秒钟反应和任天堂式荒诞感混在一起的碎片玩具。它让手机相册从「被浏览」变成「被拿来做小游戏道具」。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《曼达洛人与古古》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《曼达洛人与古古》
item.description:
Star Wars: The Mandalorian & Grogu is the first theatrical film in Disney's The Mandalorian series, with a storyline that continues after the third season. It is directed by Jon Favreau, co-written by Dave Filoni and Noah Kloor, and stars Pedro Pascal. 《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》是迪士尼旗下《曼达洛人》剧集系列的首部院线电影，故事时间线接续第三季之后，由乔恩·费儒执导，与戴夫·菲洛尼、诺亚·克鲁尔联合编剧，佩德罗·帕斯卡主演。

The plot focuses on the bounty hunter Din Djarin and the Force-sensitive apprentice Grogu, a non-biological father-son duo, as they undertake a top-secret mission crucial to the fate of the New Republic in a galaxy in turmoil after the fall of the Empire. 剧情聚焦赏金猎人丁·贾伦（Din Djarin）与原力学徒古古（Grogu）这对非血缘父子，在帝国垮台后秩序动荡的银河系中执行一项关乎新共和国命运的绝密任务。

The film continues the series' core narrative of 'father-son bond,' progressing with a game-like 'level-clearing and monster-fighting' structure. The scope is relatively restrained, not focusing on a grand confrontation between the New Republic and the Imperial remnants. 影片延续剧集「父子情」这一核心叙事主轴，以游戏式的「通关打怪」结构推进，格局相对克制，并未着力展开新共和国与帝国余孽的宏观对抗。

As of May 29, 2026, the film received a score of 7.4 on Douban (27,407 ratings), outperforming 80% of action films and 83% of sci-fi films. 截至 2026 年 5 月 29 日，影片在豆瓣获得 7.4 分（27407 人评价），好于 80% 动作片及 83% 科幻片。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《大厂病：从个体困境到组织表演》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《大厂病：从个体困境到组织表演》
item.description:
Xi Fanjun, author of 'Big Tech Sickness,' has over ten years of experience working in large technology companies, having long engaged in strategic communication and technology governance, and now focuses on organizational structure and public narrative research. 《大厂病》作者席凡君拥有十余年大型科技企业从业经历，长期从事战略传播与技术治理工作，现专注组织结构与公共叙事研究。

This book approaches the topic from a sociological perspective, drawing on theoretical resources from Weber, Foucault, Bauman, Bourdieu, and others, to systematically dissect the structural roots behind contemporary workplace phenomena such as 'involution,' 'lying flat,' and the '35-year-old crisis'. 本书以社会学视角切入，援引韦伯、福柯、鲍曼、布尔迪厄等理论资源，系统解剖「内卷」「躺平」「35 岁危机」等当代职场现象背后的结构性根源。

The book's core argument is that individual anxiety and burnout do not stem from insufficient effort, but are the inevitable products of the alienation of modern organizational structures. Xi Fanjun extracts a series of original concepts such as 'liquid person,' 'safe person,' 'performative governance,' and 'the cage of language,' dissecting how big tech companies reshape human behavior and hollow out people's sense of meaning through processes, performance, and rhetoric. 全书核心论点在于：个体的焦虑与倦怠，并非源于努力不足，而是现代组织结构异化的必然产物。席凡君提炼出「液态人」「安全人」「表演性治理」「语言的牢笼」等一系列原创概念，逐一拆解大厂如何以流程、绩效与话术重塑人的行为、掏空人的意义感。

The book points out that when companies evolve into 'self-sustaining systems,' middle managers become 'loyal hostages,' and senior employees face a higher risk of marginalization—'correct process, no one survives' is the core metaphor running through the entire book. 书中指出，当公司进化为「自我维持的系统」，中层管理者沦为「忠诚人质」，资深员工反而面临更高的边缘化风险——「流程正确，无人生还」是贯穿全书的核心隐喻。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜Steam 限免《Drift86》，适合周末试试漂移
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜Steam-限免《Drift86》，适合周末试试漂移
item.description:
Independent developer RewindApp's arcade drift racing game 'Drift86' is currently offering a limited-time free claim event on the Steam platform. The game, originally priced at 11 yuan in China, can now be claimed for free and permanently added to players' libraries. 独立开发者 RewindApp 的街机漂移竞速游戏《Drift86》正在 Steam 平台开启限时免费领取活动。该作国区原价 11 元，玩家现可免费领取并永久入库。

'Drift86' features lightweight drifting gameplay, including over 40 vehicles and more than 30 maps, supporting single-player and multiplayer modes. The game's atmosphere is influenced by 'Initial D,' with Eurobeat music and arcade-style cornering rhythms, focusing on quickly entering drifts, scoring, and repeating routes. 《Drift86》主打轻量漂移玩法，收录超过 40 种车辆和 30 多张地图，支持单人和多人模式。游戏氛围受到《头文字 D》影响，搭配 Eurobeat 音乐和街机化过弯节奏，重心放在快速进入甩尾、计分和刷路线的循环。
